title: 煮込んでとろり、優しい味に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I catch a whiff of a delicious scent once
again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't tell anyone my secret ingredient! ♪ Wait
right there, Oguri—it's almost ready!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Wait for what? Hang on, that smell... Is that...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I made curry again! I'm reheating it on the
stove right now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'd like you to taste it again. I made twice as much
as last time! ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...But why?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Why? So you can eat to your heart's content,
that's why. ♪

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's not what I mean... I mean, I'm grateful, of
course. It's just...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I think it's about done. There's plenty to go
around, so no need to gulp it all down.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you... Actually, um...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Why is it that you go so far to care for others?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why? Why? Hmm... Why indeed.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
When you put me on the spot like that, I'm not
sure why.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ah! Oh no, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The curry's going to get too hot! Hold on, I'll get
it right now.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Creek! I don't mind it piping hot, you know!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Ahhh, that was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I still don't have an answer to your question, but...
seeing you so happy makes me happy too. ♪
